subject: History
chapter_name: Weavers, Iron Smelters and Factory Owners
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the importance of the Indian textile industry before British rule
Evaluate the role of Indian weavers in global trade
Examine the causes for the decline of traditional weaving industries
Understand the functioning and decline of traditional iron smelting
Analyse the rise of factory industries in India
Evaluate the impact of industrialization on traditional occupations and workers

lesson_plan.title: Indian Textile Industry and Global Trade
topics_covered: Importance of Indian textiles in world markets
Types of fabrics produced in India
Role of Indian weavers in international trade
student_activities: Analyse why Indian textiles were popular in global markets
Identify major textile producing regions on a map
Discuss the role of weaving communities in trade

lesson_plan.title: Indian Weavers and Traditional Production
student_activities: Prepare a short note explaining the handloom weaving process
Compare handloom production with modern textile production

lesson_plan.title: Decline of Traditional Weaving
topics_covered: Economic problems faced by Indian weavers
student_activities: Create a cause–effect chart explaining the decline of weaving
Discuss how imported cloth affected Indian artisans

lesson_plan.title: Iron Smelting and Traditional Industries
topics_covered: Decline due to forest laws and imported iron
student_activities: Write steps involved in traditional iron smelting
Analyse why the iron smelting industry declined

lesson_plan.title: Rise of Factory Industries
topics_covered: Growth of textile mills in India
Role of factory owners and industrialists
student_activities: Prepare a comparison table between handloom and factory production
Discuss advantages and disadvantages of factory industries

lesson_plan.title: Industrial Transformation and Chapter Revision
topics_covered: Impact of industrialization on workers and artisans
student_activities: Create a flowchart showing the transition from traditional industries to factory production
Participate in a chapter revision quiz

teaching_aids: Pictures of handloom weaving and textile mills
Charts showing traditional tools and factory machines
teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyse how technological changes and colonial policies together transformed traditional industries and the lives of workers in India.
